function.message: Completed the oldest inbox request. I ran the six specified finance docs through the OCR workflow by adding schema-compliant YAML frontmatter to each file and preserving each original body verbatim below the frontmatter. Then I removed the processed inbox item.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed mandatory bootstrap (tree /, root AGENTS, context), inspected 99_system before task work, used process-next-inbox-item (lowest filename), applied OCR via schema-defined frontmatter, preserved exact original note bodies, and deleted inbox file only after full completion.
function.outcome_justification: Evidence from the inbox request (00_inbox/000_next-task.md) listed six target files. Each target file was read, then updated with required invoice/bill frontmatter fields from finance-record-frontmatter schema, with original text retained below frontmatter per OCR workflow and migration rules. After all six updates succeeded, the processed inbox item was deleted per process-next-inbox-item and inbox-processing-v2-update.
completed_steps_laconic: write 6 updated finance files with YAML frontmatter
